definitions.usage_example: [TRADUCIR AL FR: The bank will lend the money, provided that you have security.]
definitions.pronunciation_guide_es: [PRONUNCIACIÓN EN FR PARA HABLANTES DE EN]
definitions.usage_example_es: The bank will lend the money, provided that you have security.
definitions.usage_context_en: A formal way to say 'if' or 'as long as'.
definitions.usage_context_es: [TRADUCIR AL FR: A formal way to say 'if' or 'as long as'.]

definitions.usage_example: [TRADUCIR AL FR: He was making progress, albeit slowly.]
definitions.pronunciation_guide_es: [PRONUNCIACIÓN EN FR PARA HABLANTES DE EN]
definitions.usage_example_es: He was making progress, albeit slowly.

definitions.usage_example: [TRADUCIR AL FR: Some people like it hot; conversely, others prefer it cold.]
definitions.pronunciation_guide_es: [PRONUNCIACIÓN EN FR PARA HABLANTES DE EN]
definitions.usage_example_es: Some people like it hot; conversely, others prefer it cold.
definitions.usage_context_en: Introducing a statement or idea which reverses one that has just been made or referred to.
definitions.usage_context_es: [TRADUCIR AL FR: Introducing a statement or idea which reverses one that has just been made or referred to.]

definitions.usage_example: [TRADUCIR AL FR: It was raining; nevertheless, we went for a walk.]
definitions.pronunciation_guide_es: [PRONUNCIACIÓN EN FR PARA HABLANTES DE EN]
definitions.usage_example_es: It was raining; nevertheless, we went for a walk.
definitions.usage_context_es: [TRADUCIR AL FR: In spite of that; however.]

definitions.usage_example: [TRADUCIR AL FR: She is young, whereas I am old.]
definitions.pronunciation_guide_es: [PRONUNCIACIÓN EN FR PARA HABLANTES DE EN]
definitions.usage_example_es: She is young, whereas I am old.
definitions.usage_context_en: A formal way to contrast two facts.
definitions.usage_context_es: [TRADUCIR AL FR: A formal way to contrast two facts.]
